mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO kb_embeddings (id, knowledge_base_id, document_id, chunk_id, embedding, created_at) VALUES
(#{item.id}, #{item.knowledgeBaseId}, #{item.documentId}, #{item.chunkId}, #{item.embedding,typeHandler=com.brolei.aikb.infrastructure.vector.PgvectorTypeHandler}, #{item.createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT e.id, e.knowledge_base_id AS knowledgeBaseId, e.document_id AS documentId, e.chunk_id AS chunkId, e.embedding, e.created_at AS createdAt, 1 - (e.embedding <=> #{embedding,typeHandler=com.brolei.aikb.infrastructure.vector.PgvectorTypeHandler}) AS score FROM kb_embeddings e WHERE e.knowledge_base_id = #{knowledgeBaseId} ORDER BY score DESC LIMIT #{topK}
